best_extraction.authors: Sinclair NC, McDermott HJ, Bulluss KJ, Fallon JB, Perera T, Xu SS, Brown P, Thevathasan W
best_extraction.title: Subthalamic Nucleus Deep Brain Stimulation Evokes Resonant Neural Activity
best_extraction.study_question: Does STN-DBS evoke focal resonant neural activity linked to therapeutic benefit?
best_extraction.population_assessed: 14 Parkinson disease and 5 essential tremor patients undergoing awake DBS implantation surgery.
best_extraction.follow_up_duration: At least 3 months postsurgery; mean 390 days; one patient 560 days.
best_extraction.outcome_measures: ERNA amplitude, electrode location, and UPDRS motor improvement.
best_extraction.inclusion_criteria: Patients undergoing awake DBS implantation surgery for Parkinson disease or essential tremor.
best_extraction.answer_to_study_question: STN-DBS evoked focal ERNA, strongest dorsally, associated with better clinical improvement.

reasoning: Bibliographic fields were unanimous. For study design, all models disagreed with equal low confidence; this appears observational without control, so case_series_uncontrolled best fits. Other content merged from strong agreement and higher-confidence phrasing.

field_level_decisions.journal_name: Expanded abbreviated journal title to full consensus form.
field_level_decisions.study_design: Preferred observational case series over clinical trial or controlled cohort.
field_level_decisions.follow_up_duration: Merged consistent minimum and mean follow-up details.
